metadata.title: DailyDev - 5 Min Daily Dev Practice
metadata.description: Practice core development concepts in just 5 minutes a day.

session.title: Daily Session | DailyDev
session.description: Answer 10 questions in 5 minutes. Build your developer knowledge with daily spaced repetition practice.

stats.title: Learning Stats | DailyDev
stats.description: Track your developer learning progress — accuracy, streaks, and topic mastery at a glance.

topics.title: All Topics | DailyDev
topics.description: Explore 23 developer topics including JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, design patterns, and more.

history.description: Review your past quiz sessions, scores, and learning progress over time.

schedule.description: View your spaced repetition review schedule and upcoming questions.

practice.description: Practice developer questions by topic and difficulty at your own pace.

review.description: Focus on weaknesses and review wrong answers to improve your skills.

challenge.title: Challenge Mode | DailyDev
challenge.description: Test your speed and accuracy with timed developer quiz challenges.

focus.title: Focus Practice
focus.subtitle: Auto-analyzes weaknesses and provides tailored questions
focus.noWeaknessDescription: Questions from untouched topics will be prioritized

description.scope: Learn how JavaScript determines variable accessibility through block, function, and global scopes.
description.closure: Understand how functions remember and access variables from their outer scope, even after the outer function returns.
description.prototype: Master JavaScript's prototype chain — how objects inherit properties and methods from other objects.
description.this: Demystify the 'this' keyword — how its value changes based on how and where a function is called.
description.event-loop: Understand the core engine behind asynchronous JavaScript — the call stack, task queue, and microtasks.
description.async: Learn async/await, callbacks, and how JavaScript handles non-blocking operations.
description.type-coercion: Explore how JavaScript automatically converts types and the tricky edge cases that come with it.
description.typescript: Practice TypeScript's type system — generics, utility types, type guards, and strict typing patterns.
description.promise: Master Promises — chaining, error handling, Promise.all, race, and common async patterns.
description.dom-manipulation: Learn to create, modify, and interact with HTML elements using the DOM API.
description.css-layout: Practice Flexbox, Grid, positioning, and responsive layout techniques.
description.web-performance: Optimize loading speed, rendering, and runtime performance for web applications.
description.react-basics: Strengthen your React foundation — components, hooks, state management, and rendering behavior.
description.data-structures: Practice arrays, linked lists, trees, hash maps, and other fundamental data structures.
description.design-patterns: Learn proven solutions to common software design problems — Singleton, Observer, Factory, and more.
description.network: Understand HTTP, REST, WebSocket, DNS, and how data travels across the web.
description.algorithms: Practice sorting, searching, recursion, dynamic programming, and algorithmic thinking.
description.nodejs: Learn Node.js runtime concepts — event-driven architecture, streams, modules, and server-side patterns.
description.browser-api: Explore browser APIs — localStorage, Intersection Observer, Web Workers, and more.
description.api-design: Learn RESTful design, versioning, error handling, and API best practices.
description.web-security: Understand XSS, CSRF, CORS, authentication, and how to build secure web applications.
description.database: Practice SQL, indexing, transactions, normalization, and database design fundamentals.
description.git-advanced: Master Git beyond basics — rebase, cherry-pick, bisect, reflog, and advanced workflows.
